'''Thistleborn''' was a loyal member of the [[Central Committee of Grand Moffs]].

==Biography==
At a secret conference with the self-proclaimed heir to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], [[Trioculus]], Thistleborn recommended that a new Imperial city-seat should be established on the planet, [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. The recommendation was lacking any strategic value and was more closely tied with Thistleborn's personal desire to take control of [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]. Trioculus rejected the recommendation.

Thistleborn was sentenced to three years of hard labor on [[Bnach]] by the [[Prophets of the Dark Side]] following the death of Trioculus.

{{Char-stub}}
